CMEMS-OMI-QUID-GLO-HEALTH-carbon-ph-trend 
Issue 1.0 – June 2022 
I INTRODUCTION 
I.1. Summary 
This document is the user manual for the Copernicus Marine Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI) 
GLOBAL_OMI_HEALTH_carbon_ph_trend. It includes estimates of secular trends and the 
associated uncertainty of surface seawater pH over the global ocean.  These estimates are 
derived from the global reconstruction of surface water pH reported on total scale d istributed 
as part of MULTIOBS_GLO_BIO_CARBON_SURFACE_REP_015_008 (see V). Units are in pH units 
per year for its trend and the associated uncertainty. 
 
The product is published on the Copernicus Marine dissemination server after automatic and 
delayed-mode quality controls. Files downloaded are in NetCDF format and follow CF -1.7 
convention. 
 
Disclaimer: The quality of the product may vary during the proposed time series depending on 
the possible update of the system. 
 
The OMI is described in the Quality Information Document (QUID)  
 
 
 
I.2. History of changes 
March 2022 1st publication of GLOBAL_OMI_HEALTH_carbon_ph_trend

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for the Copernicus Marine Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI) GLOBAL_OMI_HEALTH_carbon_ph_trend, providing details on surface ocean pH trends and their uncertainty over time.
